Off Calendar Jan-23-2023 Off Calendar

Notice Of Motion And Motion To Approve Proposition 65 Settlement And Consent Judgment
Off Calendar Jan-05-2023 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: Appearances (by Zoom):
James Geocaris, Esq. 714-545-9200 of Lewis Brisbois Bisgaard & Smith for Defendant.
No other Appearance.

RULING - The matter is Uncontested/Discussed. Counsel supports the tentative ruling. The Court having reviewed the pleadings and having heard oral argument adopts the tentative ruling as follows:

PLAINTIFF GABRIEL ESPINOZA's Motion To Approve Proposition 65 Settlement And Consent Judgment.

Plaintiff's unopposed motion for "order approving Proposition 65 settlement and consent judgment" is granted.

Order and consent judgment are signed.

Judge: Richard B. Ulmer Jr., Clerk: M. Goodman, Not Reported. (302/rbu)
